name: Bug report

> **Security note:** if this is a defect in the skill text that would cause
> a generated project to violate the safety contract (token leakage, classifier
> bypass, etc.), please **do not** file it here. File a private advisory at
> <https://github.com/aditya-m-bharadwaj/APIskillBuilderSkill/security/advisories/new>
> instead. See [SECURITY.md](../../SECURITY.md).

## Summary

A one-sentence description of what is wrong.

## Where

- Section of `SKILL.md` (heading and approximate line, if applicable):
- Other file affected (path):

## Observed

What does the skill currently say or do?

## Expected

What should it say or do? Why?

## Additional context

Links to related ADRs, related issues in `linode-api-skill`, etc.
